releaseNotes:
Release v0.3.1

New Features:
- Add Advanced Git Operations node
- Automate Unity, Blender, Maya plugin zip generation
- Block self-connections and execution cycles at connect time
- Expose API token as masked password field in Unity Project Settings
- Expose API token field in Houdini settings UI
- Add ExecutionTreeContext for cross-tree validation
- Add useExecutionTrees hook for trigger tree membership

Bug Fixes:
- Fix git nodes to use global git config for author and auth
- Block cross-tree data/parameter connections (PS-126)
- Warn on cross-tree parameter expression references
- Block cross-tree execution connections with toast
- Fix new file handling (no filepath for new files)

--- From v0.3.0 ---

New Features:
- Add @input expression namespace for parameter scripting (PS-123)
- Add Create Directory node
- Free tier: synthesize Free license when no active subscription, add 'free' to licenseType
- Add plan badge and upgrade button in header for free-tier users
- Add BuyLicenseButton for free users in license modal
- Reframe purchase page as upgrade upsell with plan comparison
- Gold shimmer styling on upgrade button (header + license modal)
- Add tutorial start

Bug Fixes:
- Fix bug where free users would incorrectly see upgrade panel
- Fix UpdateNotification missing from upgrade overlay
- Fix auth: align plan checks, fall back to free license on IPC error

Improvements:
- Simplify purchase page layout (upgrade area + free area, no plan cards)
- Remove delete account modal
- Various flow and layout fixes
